summary: Tested Konekt B2B Wiring Fix Batch for iteration 328. All features verified: (1) Category→Marketplace sync working via POST /api/admin/catalog/sync-from-settings, (2) Pricing engine uses Pricing Tiers with 35% margin for Tier 1 (0-100K), A5 Notebook correctly priced at base=8000, sell=10800, (3) Customer profile accepts payment_term_type, credit_terms_enabled fields, (4) Vendor Ops price requests table has Client/Requested By and Date columns, (5) Settings Hub auto-syncs categories on save, (6) QuotesPage has 5 columns with min-w-[700px], (7) Settings Hub Product Categories has NO delete button and shows Subcategories section, (8) CreateQuotePage has 2-column layout with LIVE PREVIEW.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All wiring fix features verified: (1) POST /api/admin/catalog/sync-from-settings syncs Settings Hub categories to marketplace taxonomy (returns synced count). (2) GET /api/marketplace/taxonomy returns groups matching Settings Hub categories. (3) Pricing engine at /app/backend/services/pricing_engine.py uses get_tier_margin() to read pricing_policy_tiers from settings_hub. Tier 1 (0-100K) has 35% total_margin_pct. A5 Notebook: base=8000, sell=10800. (4) Customer profile update via PATCH /api/admin/customers-360/{id} accepts payment_term_type, credit_terms_enabled, credit_limit fields. (5) Settings Hub PUT /api/admin/settings-hub auto-syncs categories to taxonomy. (6) VendorOpsPage price requests table has columns: Request, Client/Requested By, Date, Quotes, Best Price, Status, Action. (7) QuotesPage table has 5 columns (Quote#, Customer, Total, Status, Actions) with min-w-[700px]. (8) Settings Hub Product Categories has NO delete button, expanded category shows Subcategories section with input field. (9) CreateQuotePage at /admin/quotes/new has 2-column layout with LIVE PREVIEW section.

CategoryMarketplaceSync.details: POST /api/admin/catalog/sync-from-settings returns synced count. GET /api/marketplace/taxonomy returns groups.

PricingEngine.details: Settings Hub has pricing_policy_tiers with Tier 1 (0-100K) = 35%. A5 Notebook: base=8000, sell=10800.

VendorOpsPriceRequests.details: Table has Client/Requested By and Date columns with enriched data.

QuotesPageTable.details: Table has 5 columns (Quote#, Customer, Total, Status, Actions) with min-w-[700px].

CategoryNoDelete.details: Settings Hub Product Categories has NO delete button on category items.

CategorySubcategories.details: Expanded category shows Subcategories section with 'Add subcategory...' input field.

CreateQuotePage.details: Renders at /admin/quotes/new with 2-column layout and LIVE PREVIEW section.
